creator: radicleparticles@gmail.com
text:
Unable to run named on primary name server:

named
ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libns-9.18.19.so" not found, required by "named"

ldd `which named`|grep 'not found'
	libns-9.18.19.so => not found (0)
	libisccc-9.18.19.so => not found (0)
	libisccfg-9.18.19.so => not found (0)
	libbind9-9.18.19.so => not found (0)
	libssl.so.111 => not found (0)
	libcrypto.so.111 => not found (0)
